title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: Family Theatre Tickets
questions.text: Family tickets for Saturday afternoon’s play include two adults and two children. Extra child tickets can be bought at a reduced price. Tickets are cheaper online until Thursday evening.
questions.question: What does the advert say?

options.A: Some families may need to buy extra tickets.
options.B: Online tickets are cheaper after Thursday.
options.C: Family tickets include any number of children.

questions.explanation: Family tickets include two children; extra children need extra tickets.

questions.heading: Message from Mia to Nathan
questions.text: Nathan, I’m in the music room now, but the piano lesson before mine is running late. I’ll meet you outside the hall as soon as it finishes, probably about ten past four.
questions.question: Why is Mia texting Nathan?

options.B: To explain why she will be late.
options.A: To ask him to move the piano.
options.C: To cancel her piano lesson today.

questions.explanation: Mia’s lesson is delayed, so she will meet him later.

questions.heading: School Garden
questions.text: Students may water the school garden during break, but only use the green watering cans. The hose is for staff because it reaches across the path and could cause accidents.
questions.question: What does the notice explain?

options.C: Students should use safer equipment only.
options.A: Students cannot help in the garden.
options.B: Staff must water the garden at break.

questions.explanation: Students should use green watering cans, not the hose.

questions.heading: From: Carla / Subject: Your application
questions.text: Your application for the summer course is almost complete. You’ve included your school report, but the form still needs your parent’s signature. Send it again after that and I can accept it.
questions.question: What does Carla mean?

options.A: One thing is missing from the application.
options.B: The school report should be removed now.
options.C: The application has already been accepted.

questions.explanation: The application still needs a parent’s signature.

questions.heading: Basketball Match
questions.text: Students watching today’s basketball match should enter through the side door near the gym. The main entrance is being used by players only. Please show your ticket before sitting down.
questions.question: What should spectators do?

options.B: Use a different entrance from the players.
options.A: Enter through the main door with players.
options.C: Sit down before showing their tickets.

questions.explanation: Spectators should use the side door, while players use the main entrance.
